files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Basic.DataValue
files.Summary: Abstract parent of all DV_ data value types. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.basic.DATA_VALUE

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Basic.DvBoolean
files.Summary: Items which are true or false. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.basic.DV_BOOLEAN

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Basic.DvIdentifier
files.Summary: Type for representing identifiers of real-world entities. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.basic.DV_IDENTIFIER

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Basic.DvState
files.Summary: For representing state values which obey a defined state machine, such that instances represent individual state machine states. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.basic.DV_STATE

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.DateTime.DvDate
files.Summary: Represents an ISO 8601 date. Supports partial dates (YYYY, YYYY-MM, YYYY-MM-DD). openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.date_time.DV_DATE

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.DateTime.DvDateTime
files.Summary: Represents an ISO 8601 date-time. Supports partial datetimes. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.date_time.DV_DATE_TIME

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.DateTime.DvDuration
files.Summary: Represents a duration of time in ISO 8601 format. Supports negative durations. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.date_time.DV_DURATION

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.DateTime.DvTemporal
files.Summary: Abstract parent of date/time types. Represents an absolute quantity on the time axis. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.date_time.DV_TEMPORAL

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.DateTime.DvTime
files.Summary: Represents an ISO 8601 time. Supports partial times and timezone offset. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.date_time.DV_TIME

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Encapsulated.DvEncapsulated
files.Summary: Abstract class defining the common meta-data of all types of encapsulated data. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.encapsulated.DV_ENCAPSULATED

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Encapsulated.DvMultimedia
files.Summary: A specialisation of DV_ENCAPSULATED for audiovisual and biosignal types. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.encapsulated.DV_MULTIMEDIA

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Encapsulated.DvParsable
files.Summary: Encapsulated data expressed as a parsable string, with information about its syntax. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.encapsulated.DV_PARSABLE

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvAbsoluteQuantity<T>
files.Summary: Abstract class representing absolute quantities, i.e. quantities whose values are absolute on some scale (with a defined zero point). Supports arithmetic with an accuracy type T. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_ABSOLUTE_QUANTITY

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvAmount
files.Summary: Abstract class defining the notion of a quantified amount. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_AMOUNT

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvCount
files.Summary: Countable quantities. Used for countable types such as number of episodes. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_COUNT

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvInterval<T>
files.Summary: Generic interval of an ordered type. Lower and/or upper may be open (unbounded). openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_INTERVAL

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvOrdered
files.Summary: Abstract class defining the concept of ordered values which are not also quantities. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_ORDERED

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvOrdinal
files.Summary: Models rankings and scores, e.g. pain intensity 0-10. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_ORDINAL

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvProportion
files.Summary: Models a ratio of values, i.e. where the numerator and denominator are both pure numbers. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_PROPORTION

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvQuantified
files.Summary: Abstract class representing values with a computable magnitude. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_QUANTIFIED

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvQuantity
files.Summary: Quantified type representing a measured value with units. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_QUANTITY

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.DvScale
files.Summary: A data type that represents scale values, where the values are real numbers (not just integers). Extends DV_ORDINAL with real-number value support. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.DV_SCALE

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.MagnitudeStatus
files.Summary: Valid values for DvQuantified.MagnitudeStatus.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.ProportionKind
files.Summary: Enumeration of proportion types used by DvProportion. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.PROPORTION_KIND

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Quantity.ReferenceRange<T>
files.Summary: Defines a named range to be associated with any DV_ORDERED datum. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.quantity.REFERENCE_RANGE

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Text.CodePhrase
files.Summary: A fully coordinated term from a terminology service. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.text.CODE_PHRASE

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Text.DvCodedText
files.Summary: A text item whose value must be the rubric from a controlled terminology. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.text.DV_CODED_TEXT

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Text.DvParagraph
files.Summary: A logical paragraph containing one or more DV_TEXT items. Deprecated in openEHR RM 1.1.0. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.text.DV_PARAGRAPH

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Text.DvText
files.Summary: A text item, which may contain any amount of legal characters arranged as e.g. words, sentences etc. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.text.DV_TEXT

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Text.TermMapping
files.Summary: Represents a mapping of one term to another, in the same or different terminology. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.text.TERM_MAPPING

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Text.TerminologyId
files.Summary: Identifier of a terminology. openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.terminology.TERMINOLOGY_ID

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.TimeSpecification.DvGeneralTimeSpecification
files.Summary: Represents a general time specification, typically expressed as an HL7 GTS value. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.time_specification.DV_GENERAL_TIME_SPECIFICATION

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.TimeSpecification.DvPeriodicTimeSpecification
files.Summary: Represents a periodic time specification, typically expressed as an HL7 PIVL_TS value. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.time_specification.DV_PERIODIC_TIME_SPECIFICATION

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.TimeSpecification.DvTimeSpecification
files.Summary: Specifies points in time, possibly linked to the calendar, or a real world repeating event, in a formal notation. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.time_specification.DV_TIME_SPECIFICATION

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Uri.DvEhrUri
files.Summary: A DV_URI type specifically for EHR URIs, using the ehr:// scheme. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.uri.DV_EHR_URI

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataTypes.Uri.DvUri
files.Summary: A reference to an object which structurally conforms to the URI RFC. openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_types.uri.DV_URI

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Archetyped.Archetyped
files.Summary: Archetypes act as the constraint rules for instances of information classes. This class records archetype and template information for a object. Corresponds to ARCHETYPED in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.archetyped.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Archetyped.FeederAudit
files.Summary: Audit and provenance information for non-openEHR data committed to the EHR as part of feeder system integration. Corresponds to FEEDER_AUDIT in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.archetyped.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Archetyped.FeederAuditDetails
files.Summary: Audit details for any system that has created or committed the item to a transfer from the primary EHR system. Corresponds to FEEDER_AUDIT_DETAILS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.archetyped.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Archetyped.Link
files.Summary: The LINK type defines a logical relationship between two items, such as two instances. Links can be used across EHR compositions. Corresponds to LINK in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.archetyped.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Archetyped.Locatable
files.Summary: Root structural class of all information model classes that can be archetyped. Has a , a and optionally a . Corresponds to LOCATABLE in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.archetyped.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Archetyped.Pathable
files.Summary: Abstract ancestor of all classes whose instances are reachable by path traversal and which know their parent. Corresponds to PATHABLE in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.archetyped.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.ChangeControl.Contribution
files.Summary: Documents a contribution of a set of versions added to a change-controlled repository. Corresponds to CONTRIBUTION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.change_control.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.ChangeControl.ImportedVersion<T>
files.Summary: Represents a version whose content was imported from another EHR system. The imported item is wrapped in an from the source system. Corresponds to IMPORTED_VERSION<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.change_control.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.ChangeControl.OriginalVersion<T>
files.Summary: A version created locally in an EHR system. Corresponds to ORIGINAL_VERSION<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.change_control.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.ChangeControl.Version<T>
files.Summary: Abstract model of a version of an item in a . Corresponds to VERSION<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.change_control.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.ChangeControl.VersionedObject<T>
files.Summary: Version-controlled container for instances of a particular type. Manages the list of versions and provides derived queries over them. Corresponds to VERSIONED_OBJECT<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.change_control.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.Attestation
files.Summary: Record an attestation by a party of the content of a version. Extends with attestation-specific fields. Corresponds to ATTESTATION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.AuditDetails
files.Summary: The set of attributes required to document the committal of an information item to a repository. Corresponds to AUDIT_DETAILS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.Participation
files.Summary: Model of a participation of a party in an activity. Used to record past and planned participations of parties (clinicians, devices) in activities. Corresponds to PARTICIPATION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.PartyIdentified
files.Summary: Proxy data for an identified party other than the subject of the EHR, such as a doctor, nurse, or organisation. Corresponds to PARTY_IDENTIFIED in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.PartyProxy
files.Summary: Abstract concept of a proxy description of a party, including an optional link to data for that party in a demographic or other identity service. Corresponds to PARTY_PROXY in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.PartyRelated
files.Summary: Proxy for a party known by relationship to the subject of the EHR, e.g. "mother", "brother". Corresponds to PARTY_RELATED in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.PartySelf
files.Summary: Party proxy representing the subject of the EHR. Used to represent the subject of a EHR_STATUS, which is the patient. Corresponds to PARTY_SELF in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.RevisionHistory
files.Summary: Defines the notion of a revision history of a versioned item, as a list of objects, each containing version id and audit trail information. Corresponds to REVISION_HISTORY in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Common.Generic.RevisionHistoryItem
files.Summary: An entry in a , representing the audits for a single version. Corresponds to REVISION_HISTORY_ITEM in openEHR RM 1.1.0 common.generic.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Composition
files.Summary: One version of the archetyped content, authored and committed to an EHR. A composition is the unit of clinical information committed to the EHR. Corresponds to COMPOSITION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.ContentItem
files.Summary: Abstract ancestor of all clinical content classes. Corresponds to CONTENT_ITEM in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.Action
files.Summary: Entry type for documenting the execution of an instruction. Records what was done, when, and the resulting instruction state transition. Corresponds to ACTION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.Activity
files.Summary: Defines a single activity within an INSTRUCTION, such as "administer 500mg paracetamol". Corresponds to ACTIVITY in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.AdminEntry
files.Summary: Entry sub-type for administrative information, i.e. information about setting up the clinical process, but not about the clinical process itself. Examples: appointments, demographic data. Corresponds to ADMIN_ENTRY in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.CareEntry
files.Summary: Abstract parent of all clinical (care-related) entries. Corresponds to CARE_ENTRY in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.Entry
files.Summary: Abstract ancestor of all clinical entries. An entry is the atomic unit of information in a composition. Corresponds to ENTRY in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.Evaluation
files.Summary: Entry type for clinical assessments, diagnoses, problem statements, and plans. Corresponds to EVALUATION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.Instruction
files.Summary: Entry type for orders, prescriptions, or other instructions to be carried out. Corresponds to INSTRUCTION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.InstructionDetails
files.Summary: Used to record details of the Instruction that caused an Action to be performed. Corresponds to INSTRUCTION_DETAILS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.IsmTransition
files.Summary: Model of a transition in the Instruction State Machine (ISM), used to record the execution state of an instruction. Corresponds to ISM_TRANSITION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Entry.Observation
files.Summary: Entry type for observations, measurements, or findings. Corresponds to OBSERVATION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.entry.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.Content.Navigation.Section
files.Summary: Represents a heading in a clinical record, used to organise entries into logical sections (like paper record headings). Corresponds to SECTION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.content.navigation.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Composition.EventContext
files.Summary: Documents the context information of a healthcare event in which the associated COMPOSITION was created. Corresponds to EVENT_CONTEXT in openEHR RM 1.1.0 composition.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.DataStructure
files.Summary: Abstract parent class of all openEHR data structure types. Corresponds to DATA_STRUCTURE in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.History.Event<T>
files.Summary: Abstract ancestor of point and interval event types. Corresponds to EVENT<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.history.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.History.History<T>
files.Summary: Root object of a linear time series, where each entry is an EVENT of some kind. Corresponds to HISTORY<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.history.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.History.IntervalEvent<T>
files.Summary: Defines the notion of a period of time event, e.g. average blood pressure over 24 hours. Corresponds to INTERVAL_EVENT<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.history.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.History.PointEvent<T>
files.Summary: Defines the notion of a point in time event, i.e. a single observation recorded at a specific moment. Corresponds to POINT_EVENT<T> in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.history.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.ItemStructure.ItemList
files.Summary: ITEM_STRUCTURE that holds a flat list of ELEMENTs. Corresponds to ITEM_LIST in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.item_structure.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.ItemStructure.ItemSingle
files.Summary: ITEM_STRUCTURE that holds a single ELEMENT. Corresponds to ITEM_SINGLE in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.item_structure.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.ItemStructure.ItemStructure
files.Summary: Abstract parent class of all item structure types. Corresponds to ITEM_STRUCTURE in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.item_structure.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.ItemStructure.ItemTable
files.Summary: ITEM_STRUCTURE that represents a tabular structure with named columns and typed rows. Rows are CLUSTERs, columns are ELEMENTs within each row CLUSTER. Corresponds to ITEM_TABLE in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.item_structure.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.ItemStructure.ItemTree
files.Summary: ITEM_STRUCTURE that holds a tree of ITEM objects (CLUSTERs and ELEMENTs). Corresponds to ITEM_TREE in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.item_structure.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.Representation.Cluster
files.Summary: The grouping variant of ITEM, for structurally complex data. Can contain a mix of ELEMENT and CLUSTER children. Corresponds to CLUSTER in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.representation.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.Representation.Element
files.Summary: The leaf variant of ITEM, which carries a value of type DATA_VALUE. Either or must be set, but not both. Corresponds to ELEMENT in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.representation.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.DataStructures.Representation.Item
files.Summary: Abstract parent class of all ITEM types, i.e. those that represent leaf or intermediate data items in a data structure. Corresponds to ITEM in openEHR RM 1.1.0 data_structures.representation.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Ehr.AccessControlSettings
files.Summary: Abstract class defining the concept of access control settings for an EHR. Concrete subtypes are defined by EHR system vendors. Corresponds to ACCESS_CONTROL_SETTINGS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 ehr.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Ehr.Ehr
files.Summary: The EHR object is the root object and access point of an EHR for a subject of care. Corresponds to EHR in openEHR RM 1.1.0 ehr.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Ehr.EhrAccess
files.Summary: EHR-wide access control record. The object is vendor-defined; this class provides the structural wrapper and the derived function. Corresponds to EHR_ACCESS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 ehr.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Ehr.EhrStatus
files.Summary: Single object per EHR, containing key summary status information about the EHR as a whole. Corresponds to EHR_STATUS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 ehr.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Ehr.VersionedComposition
files.Summary: Versioned container for COMPOSITION instances. Corresponds to VERSIONED_COMPOSITION in openEHR RM 1.1.0 ehr.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Ehr.VersionedEhrAccess
files.Summary: Versioned container for EHR_ACCESS instances. Corresponds to VERSIONED_EHR_ACCESS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 ehr.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Ehr.VersionedEhrStatus
files.Summary: Versioned container for EHR_STATUS instances. Corresponds to VERSIONED_EHR_STATUS in openEHR RM 1.1.0 ehr.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.AccessGroupRef
files.Summary: Reference to an access group. The namespace is "local" or a globally known access group namespace. Corresponds to ACCESS_GROUP_REF in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.ArchetypeId
files.Summary: Identifier for archetypes. Instances of this class are immutable. Value format: <rm_originator>-<rm_name>-<rm_entity>.<domain_concept>.v<version_id> e.g. "openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.blood_pressure.v1" Corresponds to ARCHETYPE_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.GenericId
files.Summary: Generic identifier type for identifiers whose format is not known to openEHR. Corresponds to GENERIC_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.HierObjectId
files.Summary: Concrete type corresponding to the identifier of an object in a hierarchy. Used for EHR identifiers, system identifiers, etc. Corresponds to HIER_OBJECT_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.InternetId
files.Summary: Model of a reverse Internet domain, used as a namespace identifier. Value is a dot-separated reverse domain name, e.g. "org.openehr". Corresponds to INTERNET_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.IsoOid
files.Summary: Model of ISO's Object Identifier (OID) scheme of identifiers. Value is a string of dotted integers, e.g. "1.2.840.113549". Corresponds to ISO_OID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.LocatableRef
files.Summary: Reference to a LOCATABLE instance inside the top-level content structure inside a VERSION<T>, with optional path to a specific item. Corresponds to LOCATABLE_REF in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.ObjectId
files.Summary: Abstract ancestor of all identifier types. Corresponds to OBJECT_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.ObjectRef
files.Summary: Class describing a reference to another object, using a namespace, type, and identifier. Corresponds to OBJECT_REF in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.ObjectVersionId
files.Summary: Globally unique identifier for one version of a versioned object. Value format: <object_id>::<creating_system_id>::<version_tree_id> e.g. "F7C3A031-CE71-4F37-8F89::example.org::1". Corresponds to OBJECT_VERSION_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.PartyRef
files.Summary: Identifier for parties in a party namespace, typically from a demographic or directory service. Constrains the allowed namespaces and types. Corresponds to PARTY_REF in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.TemplateId
files.Summary: Identifier for templates. A template is a further constraint on an archetype. Corresponds to TEMPLATE_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.Uid
files.Summary: Abstract parent of classes whose instances are unique identifiers of information entities. Corresponds to UID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.UidBasedId
files.Summary: Abstract ancestor of identifiers based on ISO/IEC 11578:1996. Value has the form: <root>[:<extension>] where root is a UID. Corresponds to UID_BASED_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.Uuid
files.Summary: Model of the DCE Universal Unique Identifier (UUID) scheme of identifiers. Value is a string of the form: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx Corresponds to UUID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: OpenEHR.RM.Support.Identification.VersionTreeId
files.Summary: Identifier of a version in a version tree. Value format: <trunk_version>[.<branch_number>.<branch_version>] e.g. "1", "1.1.1", "2.1.3". Corresponds to VERSION_TREE_ID in openEHR RM 1.1.0 support.identification.

files.Title: Clarotech.OpenEHR.RM.Json.OpenEhrJsonOptions
files.Summary: Provides a pre-configured for openEHR canonical JSON.

files.Title: Clarotech.OpenEHR.RM.Json.OpenEhrJsonSerializer
files.Summary: Provides static methods for serializing and deserializing openEHR RM objects to and from canonical JSON.
